description: Flat-design landscape graphic in USCIS house style on a white background. The top left carries the official seal and stacked wordmark 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' (with the DHS seal). The left two-thirds is a bold red sans-serif headline reading 'When mailing a form, do not send an original document unless filing instructions specifically ask for it.' On the right is a large flat navy-blue vector illustration of a residential mailbox on a post with its red flag raised. Across the bottom runs a full-width navy banner with white bold text: 'For more information visit uscis.gov/forms.' The image is a vector illustration with typography, not a photo.
notable_text: When mailing a form, do not send an original document unless filing instructions specifically ask for it. / For more information visit uscis.gov/forms. / U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
